title: filix-mas augescens var. normalis
intro: Filix-mas augescens var. normalis, also known as the Ostrich Fern or Royal Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Filix-mas augescens var. normalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying the fronds, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
